description_long: This is a rectangular bathtub with a deep, straight-sided basin and a flat rim, finished in a dark, glossy color. The tub has a minimalist design with no visible ornamentation or external features, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance. The interior is smooth and continuous, with gently rounded corners for comfort and easy cleaning. The exterior walls are vertical and uniform, contributing to a boxy silhouette. There are no visible plumbing fixtures, handles, or decorative feet, emphasizing its simple and functional style. The bathtub appears to be made of a solid, durable material, likely enameled steel or acrylic, suitable for installation in contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, rectangular bathtub with a deep, smooth basin and a glossy dark finish, featuring a minimalist, unadorned design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length and depth of the rectangular bathtub with its flat rim and smooth, dark surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow width and straight, vertical walls of the bathtub.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same rectangular shape and glossy finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the bathtub's depth and straight profile.
